name: Risotto Verde (Green Rice)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Water from cooking the asparagus (strained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and trim the asparagus, then cook in lightly salted water until tender.
2. Carefully remove the tender tips (approximately 3 inches) and reserve them on the side.
3. In a blender, puree the remaining stems with some of the reserved water, strain the mixture, and add enough water to make a total of 2 cups of liquid.
4. Melt the butter in oil over medium heat.
5. Sauté the chopped onion until translucent.
6. Add the rice and stir to combine.
7. Gradually add the asparagus broth, stirring constantly, until all the liquid is absorbed.
8. Continue adding the chicken broth, one ladle at a time, allowing each portion to be absorbed before adding more.
9. Stir frequently to prevent sticking.
10. When the rice is cooked and al dente, gently fold in the grated cheese and asparagus tips.
11. Serve hot.
